name: solid-scope-go-interface
doc: The `solid` plugin scope in isolation (validate-solid.ts). Unlike core, the solid scope short-circuits in handlePre (handle-pre.ts:55-57) to validateSolidGate ONLY — a Go/Python interface-location check gated behind SOLID_PROJECT_TYPE, NEVER the file-size ceiling. A top-level Go interface outside /interfaces/ is denied; the same interface INSIDE internal/interfaces/ is allowed. This is why 01 (file-size) runs in CORE, not solid.

steps.doc: Go interface outside /interfaces/ → GO_INTERFACE_RE matches (validate-solid.ts:16,22-23) → deny "SOLID: Interfaces must be in internal/interfaces/".
Same interface INSIDE internal/interfaces/ → checkGo early-returns null (validate-solid.ts:22 `filePath.includes("/interfaces/")`) → validateSolidGate returns "" → allow.
